1:
Decisiveness and originality define this person. Their approach to problems is unique; they are bold enough to forge their own unconventional paths. They are deeply concerned with their own standing, striving for success and fulfillment. They wish to rise to the occasion and possess the finest things. They demand respect and attention, becoming irritable and harsh when events do not unfold as they would like. They strive to be at the forefront and at the center of events. In any undertaking they rely on their own strength and methods. They prefer to run their own enterprise. They work with total dedication to bring their life plans to fruition. 
Willpower and persistence are the chief ingredients of their success.
A dynamic pace of life can lead to stress. They must watch their health; a regimen of physical exercise, autogenic training, and time in nature will help them release nervous tension. 
Self-discipline and self-control, kindness and tolerance will give them a constructive approach to life's challenges.

To be a leader, to take responsibility. To become independent, to be able to make decisions. To lead. 
The most strong-willed of all: leaders, managers, organizers, big bosses, and power-hungry careerists.
People of power, they are not afraid to take on responsibility. If you need a manager, or someone who will bring order to your business or production, they are the ones to turn to. They know how to govern, how to optimize an entire process, how to make work what does not work. People who are organizers and innovators. 
Strong-willed, stubborn, goal-driven, commanding. But in their drive to take leading positions they may walk over others, noticing no one and nothing, and may slide into despotism. In personal relationships they likewise prefer the leader's position, and at times may overdo it and drift into despotism. 
Egoism. The notion of femininity is inaccessible to them (if the person is undeveloped); above all, their own interests matter most.
Their word is very powerful; they must take great care with what they say, for much of it comes to pass. They possess the power of persuasion (almost hypnotic). If you do not feel such qualities within yourself, life will place you in situations and toss you such problems that you will step onto your true path, developing independence, self-reliance, and leadership. 
To lead people, it is important to be self-reliant and responsible, to be able to make decisions, not to be selfish; rising upward, one must not walk over others, nor boast. Such a person may have a great many friends yet still feel lonely. Inventive. Active, daring. 
They are inclined toward psychological manipulation (not all, but many) and toward suppressing the will of those around them. Women with such a character are very strong.

Egoism, vanity, and pride can pull one away from a realistic view of the situation, becoming a destructive force. Unbridled anger, aggressiveness, and vindictiveness complicate relationships with those around them.

Chief, manager, head administrator, person in power, director. Entrepreneur, businessman. Actor, film director. Jeweler, designer (anything connected with luxury). A creative, extraordinary person. Lion tamer. Lighting technician. Professions connected with children and play. You may be drawn to business, military or civil service, and any activity where you can lead. Management. Politics. Your own enterprise, producer, curator, mentor. Teacher.
Recommendations: women with such a character should not stay on maternity leave for too long. They absolutely must realize themselves, otherwise they become despotic. A good bond with the father is important; the better the bond with the father, the better the financial flow.
RED and all shades of pink, coral
11:
Intuition and inspiration define this person's path. They possess great abilities, intellect, and high energy. They strive for new ideas and knowledge. They know how to listen to others, are observant, and able to grasp on the fly every detail of what is happening. They strive for harmony, especially in family relationships. Inner equilibrium is of paramount importance to them. They get along easily with people, often relying on their own intuition.
They respond sensitively to ongoing changes. Thanks to an analytical cast of mind, they are able to see the lawful pattern within chance occurrences and details, to reconstruct the whole from a small part. They are distinguished by clarity and precision in their work. They love to systematize and order everything. Spiritual self-perfection is essential, along with a spiritual teacher who will help them realize their inner self. This person is themselves a spiritual reference point for many people, helping them find inner peace and spiritual fortitude. They have all the qualities of a comforter and healer of people, as well as the aspiration to help others in any situation. Their creative activity often inspires other people. Creative potential and the aspiration to leadership may manifest in various spheres of life. 
When making decisions, they carefully analyze the known facts while relying to a significant degree on innate intuition.
They need to protect their nervous system, which is very sensitive to stress owing to their high overall receptivity. They have a strongly developed sense of the beautiful, as well as a sense of harmony and rhythm.

To be a spiritual leader; you came here to guide others, showing them their way. Grand scale. 
Special people. Spiritual leaders. They possess all the qualities found in people with the Life Path Number 2 (since the digits of 11 sum to 2). That is, they are excellent communicators, diplomats, partners. Their distinction is that they are also managers, spiritual leaders, and coaches.
The number 11 is the number of globality and scale; everything they do can be on the level of a city, a country, or the planet. From childhood they feel that a great role in this world is destined for them. They are meant to bring enlightenment to the masses, to teach wisdom, to introduce new technologies, to drive progress. 
Most important is that their profession be connected with helping people. 
Many feel a pull toward the esoteric sciences: astrology, numerology, various techniques of self-knowledge, and so on. 
They can choose any direction and field of activity and succeed in it, because everything will work out!
But! 
Their greatest problem is indecision. Of all the numbers, they believe in themselves the least; they eternally doubt and stand still. They are forever waiting, waiting for the right moment, person, or day. They constantly need motivation. They think: as soon as I buy an apartment / find a job / take a vacation / have a child, then... I'll move mountains... then I'll really live... then I'll start acting. 
Do not wait!!! 
Act; life is one, this is not a rough draft, there will be no other; you may never live to see the right moment. Never! And you will squander your life and all the opportunities given to you. And much is truly given to you: opportunities, finances, universal love, anything at all - just start acting!
Outstanding strategists and brilliant orators. If they truly want something, they will mobilize all their resources and achieve it. 
Only by stepping over all doubts and fears will you begin to live and find your path. 11 means a high level of intuition, vividly expressed creative abilities, enthusiasm, humanism. The mission of one who bears the number 11 is enlightening activity in any field, where the key to success is, above all, the aspiration toward spiritual goals. Refusing to fulfill this mission threatens the destruction of the personality. 
Master Number 11. People with the Life Path Number 11 were born with higher vibrations. They are distinguished by heightened sensitivity. Because their energy-information channels are open, a closer connection with the unseen world is established.
Such people, especially in childhood, may see entities from beyond, hear the voices of the deceased and of ancestors. To many, such people seem strange and incomprehensible. These people live by emotions, by deep experiences. At the same time, they possess such powerful energy that you will always take notice of them. The most active age for unfolding their potential begins in the second half of life, around 35-45. 
These people always hold lofty ideas, of which they are ready to be the conduits. They are leaders, and their leadership manifests in the ability to convincingly convey their idea. They believe that it is precisely the development of the spirit and a correct understanding of people and the world as a whole that will make us happy. True, excessive sensitivity makes the bearers of Master Number 11 quite vulnerable to criticism, misunderstanding, and imperfection. Nervous breakdowns, self-flagellation, and depressive states are possible.
Those who fully manifest their abilities, who are able to bring their ideas to life and do not yield to negative, ruinous emotions, will be rewarded by fate. These are remarkably diplomatic, tactful people who possess great patience for the weaknesses of others. Among the bearers of Master Number 11 there are many actors, creative people, and servants of spiritual cults. Often they are healers, especially in the area of acupuncture and various kinds of massage.

An inclination toward self-immersion makes them dreamy, leading them away into a world of abstract ideas. There may be a loss of contact with reality, emotional instability, uncertainty, depression. Without an aspiration toward spirituality, heavy karmic trials set in, irreversible changes for the worse, mental disorders, severe illnesses; the person withdraws and declines.

Doctor, nurse - work connected with helping people, caregiving. Psychology. Raising children. Stage and film actors, poets, musicians, writers. Travel, connection with water, dairy farming. Home-care work. Psychology, trainers of educational programs, executives, psychotherapists, teachers, lawyers, doctors, astrologers, numerologists. Real estate. Politics. Spiritual mentors.
2:
Receptivity, emotionality, and responsiveness define such a person. These qualities are simultaneously their strength and their weakness. Heightened attention to their own feelings, as well as to the feelings of those around them, can lead to a failure to reveal their personality and their considerable abilities. 
Such a person intuitively senses what people think or feel. This helps them show tact and diplomacy in communication. They act calmly and judiciously in any circumstances, in any surroundings. Because of strong sensitivity there may be great touchiness, irritability, avoidance of resolving sharp problems, and a tendency to conceal their thoughts and feelings.
A familiar setting and established relationships give them confidence. From them emanates a calm, constant care. To some they seem slow and dull; others greatly enjoy their soothing comfort. Such a person needs security, calm surroundings, and the care of loving people. In everyday life they are trusting and open. They accept life as it is. Before deciding on anything, they think the matter through carefully. They rely on feelings and intuition. If the Duty sector is 88/888, they are responsible, taking on many tasks and obligations; this often goes unappreciated, and their achievements remain unnoticed. They love their home, comfort, and order. To help people through diplomacy. To bring peace to the world! To reconcile conflicts, find compromises, and above all help people find peace, for this will bring them immense inner satisfaction and increase their chances of achieving material success.

The number of help and partnership. Peacemakers. The finest diplomats. To help people, to mentor them spiritually, to offer moral support. 
Excellent orators. They can defuse any conflict, calm anyone, and find an approach to everyone. Sociable, kind, open, fond of company. The best partners for business and for marriage, able to interact and cooperate. True, if they do not realize themselves and have taken a wrong turn, chaos begins around them - conflicts, troubles, strange people - all so that the twos learn to compromise, to smooth over conflicts, to help, to listen, to advise.
They know how to hear and to listen; they are good psychologists and teachers. They can come to terms with anyone. Success comes to twos through flexibility and the ability to adapt; the key in this matter is not to overdo it and not to grovel. They are meticulous, diligent, and attentive. 
They are among those who handle the settling of conflicts, and they will have to soothe troubles constantly. This may not always align with their wishes, but they came into the world with such a mission, and it must be fulfilled not only for the sake of success but also to attain inner peace and happiness. 
When things are not going smoothly, try to bring tact, diplomacy, and courtesy into play; resolving disputes is your profession. Avoid entering the struggle for existence.
Diplomatically reconcile others; calm, comfort, counsel, advise, and help people find peace, for this will bring you immense inner satisfaction and increase your chances of achieving material success.

Emotionally vulnerable, dependent on the feelings of those around them. There may be outbursts of emotion or depression. Indecision, an undefined stance in life, suspiciousness. Shifting responsibility onto others. Inclined to attach too much importance to trifles, forgetting what is essential.

Nurse - work connected with helping people, caregiving. Psychology. Raising children. Stage and film actors, poets, musicians, writers. Travel, connection with water.
Dairy farming. Home-care work. Teachers, counseling (psychology, esoterics, psychotherapy, medicine, etc.), medicine. Mediator, diplomat, orator, motivator, coach, managers.
22:
You were born under the aegis of the most powerful and promising of all Life Path Numbers. This indicates that life will offer you extreme alternatives. On the one hand, you possess the potential abilities of the Great Architect, the capacity to perceive the great in spiritual realms and to translate it into the material world. On the other hand, you may sink into the depths of ignorance and even be unable to feed yourself. Your strength is of a very unusual kind. It manifests through the ability to bring great ideas and prospects to life by uniting and inspiring other people. Only by drawing on collective effort will you be able to bring together people, ideas, and resources - the three elements required to realize your plans.
Now it is clear why your path to your life's goal is so often filled with dramatic events. Because the most opposite characteristics are united in your nature, you possess both inspiration and innate practicality. Thus, for example, you can cooperate effectively with the most diverse people - this allows you to enlist them for the achievement of a common goal. Your life's task is to turn dreams into reality. In short, you are the dreamer who stands firmly on the ground. You are endowed with an extraordinarily strong sense of community. You are able to see the merits and potential of every idea, and on top of that, the practical ways to bring it to life. Somehow you manage to see the limits of a given idea's possibilities: from which point and to which point it will work. This is an intuitive ability that allows you to assess the possibilities of ideas as applied to practice.
Though the number 22 promises its bearer much, they must nonetheless be prepared for the fact that they will have to toil considerably in life. You have great ambitions, and though they are hard to manage, it is precisely they that will allow you to achieve all your goals. In any kind of relationship you are a faithful partner. You always give good advice and follow it with moral support. 
Your life lesson is to learn to share the views of others and to allow them to make a personal contribution to a common cause. This will require flexibility, which is the least developed trait of your character. Often you lack faith in the abilities of other people. That is precisely why you have a tendency to over-control people and situations, and sometimes you make attempts to manipulate them. Flights of fancy cause you no discomfort, but by your nature you are indifferent to emotional outbursts.
You are unconventional in your thoughts and deeds, but you prefer to appear traditional. Your initial accumulation of capital should occur at the age of 22, when you lay the first brick of your prosperity. Carry with you a talisman in the form of the Sun.

22/4 The Master Builder. The challenge of this number is to develop a positive and constructive use of energy. The task is to learn patience, discipline, and resolve in order to carry spiritual consciousness into the material world through embodiment. 
The mastery of enterprise. The number 22/4 possesses exceptional organizational abilities. This is because it holds a balance between a focused mind and the highest ideals, bringing both to any project or undertaking.
The number 22/4 is a born leader and can use esoteric wisdom to achieve tangible results. This master number strives for large projects or sets major goals; its lesson is to use these aspirations for the universal good. 
22/4 is the number of one who is serious, hardworking, loyal, and supportive of others. Like all master numbers, the 22/4 feels deeply, but it is not carried away by unproductive daydreaming. On the contrary, the dreams of the 22/4 are grounded in reality and practical benefit. In the end, this master is a laborer, and they want to work hard to bring their vision of humanity to life. Interestingly, the root of the number 22 is 4, the number of diligent labor, and the Russian word for 'work' sums to the number 22: R=9; A=1; B=2; O=7; T=2; A=1.
The number 22/4 can function successfully in fields that offer broad horizons, are oriented toward national and international interests, and support universal understanding, peace, and higher self-awareness. The weaknesses of the number 22/4: like all master numbers, the 22/4 is very sensitive. Since the 22/4 tends to become involved in large projects, they may feel overwhelmed by too many obstacles.
Moderation in one's affairs is important! It is important to allocate one's strength properly! Remember that master numbers are very high vibrations and require a balance of the mental, physical, and emotional.
Character. Bearers of the number 22 are endowed with extraordinary organizational abilities, a logical mind, the ability to generate ideas and to inspire others with them. They can achieve a great deal in the material world and even change people's lives through their grand projects. 
Destiny. Having recognized yourself as a master, capable of achieving much, you may become a political leader, an inspirer of the masses, a managing figure on a national or even global scale, or one who brings revolutionary change to the field of science and technological progress. If for some reason the emergence onto this highest path for you does not occur, the development of destiny corresponds to Code 4. Activity, military commander, head of state, outstanding politician, scientist, inventor, architect, builder.

Indifference, an inferiority complex, a tendency to fall into extremes, boastfulness. Some representatives of the number 22 take part in crimes and display mental disorder. In the worst case, such a person circumvents the law, using acquired information for their own selfish ends. These are false teachers and false prophets.

You do well in business and politics. You navigate grand projects and can think and act on an international scale. The possibility of success is very high for you in such areas as banking, statistics, management, organizational activity, construction, agriculture, science, and all legal forms of activity.
3:
Self-expression is the main thing in such a person. They try to derive pleasure from work, from communication with friends, from love, hobbies, and so on. People are drawn to them and value their company. They simply live and rejoice in life. Within them lies the ability to engage in several pursuits at once. They do not trouble themselves with choices and world problems, believing that life will arrange everything in its place and that it is better to trust its flow. Most often, a multitude of opportunities opens before them. They are quick to act and adapt rapidly to any situation. They manage to try a little of everything. They consider any experience a blessing, believing that even unpleasantness is a useful lesson. They are able to create favorable opportunities for themselves in all spheres of activity, both in personal relationships and at work.
Their optimism and broad nature inspire those around them and help to overcome setbacks. They live by today's aspirations and may neglect their obligations. They magnanimously forgive their own and others' missteps. Socially active and popular. To be a muse, to inspire and motivate others. Through their creativity, achievements, and good cheer. Muses. An exceptional gift of persuasion that must absolutely be put to use.

WHAT A TALENT!!! MUSES! This can be said of any three; they are talented in various fields, from art to the IT sphere. Creative and inventive. Actors, dancers, musicians, painters, IT specialists, innovators, creatives - all of them. Cheerful, open, incorrigible optimists.
Their aim and purpose is to inspire others through their creativity, achievements, and good cheer. Muses. Threes love to live beautifully, to surround themselves with elegant things, to eat and drink well; in this they must be careful, for they often overdo it. They have the best sense of humor; it is very easy and pleasant to communicate with them; people love them and are drawn to them.
The most important thing for them is to find their talent and to realize it, to develop it. To show it to the world. For their main flaw is the loss of interest. When the Interest and Energy sector in the matrix is empty, they catch fire quickly and burn out quickly. They may scatter themselves, grab at everything at once, yet bring nothing to completion. They must learn to see things through to the end. 
The power of their word is strong; they had better watch what they say. They should not even curse.
Moreover, the three is one of the most undecided numbers. When the character is 11/, they are forever in search of their purpose. But the problem is that they catch fire quickly, just as quickly cool off, and rarely bring matters to completion. This is the effect of their restless creative nature. It does not itself know what it wants. Though in truth it is simply lazy and does not want to take on responsibility.
Life Path 3: You have a creative destiny, and you are required to be an OPTIMIST. Your mission in life is to help people realize the magical power of cheerfulness and inspiration. Your life's mission and duty is to awaken their imagination and spirit until faith in people, in human friendship, flares up in them again and they can laugh once more. This may not always prove easy for you, but it is a component of your success, and you must make every effort to ensure it.
Popularity, love, romance, and money are foreordained for you, but they will come to you only if your own life is suffused with beauty, art, and inspiration. Do not be afraid to laugh in the face of troubles. Combine sincerity with joy, and you will not fail. If you cannot express your ideas and character in some creative and inspired way, train your mind until this comes to you easily and naturally. In the end, opportunities will open before you that you could obtain by no other means.

There may be a lack of scruples about the means of achieving a goal, insolence, tactlessness. In striving to manage everything, they take on several matters at once, driving themselves to complete exhaustion.
One should know the boundary at which it is necessary to stop and look around; to be able to be content with what one has, to recognize the need to limit the sphere of one's activity: 'one cannot embrace the boundless.' In life's failures they may blame those around them and grow embittered. They must learn to live by a plan and to concentrate their efforts in a single sphere of activity.

Military, police, sports, surgery. Technical and engineering professions, machine-building, metallurgy, mining, connection with fire. Dangerous professions. Leadership. Creative professions - performer, dancer, painter, director. Professions connected with the art of oratory and inspiring people - lecturers, teachers, masters of ceremonies, designers, all creative professions, journalists, producers, copywriters, IT specialists. Network marketing, advertising, sales. Bloggers. And so on.
THE CELTIC RADIANT CROSS, THE SYMBOL OF THE CLAN
33: 33 is the number of the Master-Teacher. They are able to generate ideas, to unite people; they are leaders of large collectives. The planet of this number is Chiron. The chief function of this planet is the expansion of human possibilities, the connection between the inner and outer world of a person; it governs the materialization of subtle planes. The goal of your present incarnation is to develop diplomatic qualities within yourself, to know the depths of human psychology, and to strive to be a peacemaker in all difficult situations. Moreover, your task is not so much to settle conflicts as to prevent them from arising. True Chironites appear only on the condition that the other planets have been worked through (and even then only after the age of 33); they possess abilities in astrology.

The destiny and character of a person with the number 33 in numerology signify an altruistic desire to be of benefit to people, drawing the spiritual forces of compassion and love into the material world. In the bearer of this vibration, the qualities of mentorship and a heightened sense of justice are joined. They try to protect and come to the aid of all the destitute, the wronged, and the disenfranchised. Such personalities choose the mission of spiritual teacher for all of humanity and may become enlighteners, writers, poets, or painters. This unique master vibration is regarded as karmic number 33, whose meaning unites all the finest qualities of the three and the six - imagination, artistry, sociability, warmth of heart, forgiveness, romance, and love.
33/6 - the mastery of giving. The fundamental orientation of the number 33/6 is to be of benefit, to serve, and to help as many people as possible. Owing to a strong need for justice and the observance of human rights, these numbers often care for the elderly and the disabled or are engaged in any other field that benefits people. This number would like to heal everyone with love. 
Attributes of the 33/6: Any master number possesses a special gift for working with humanity and an indifference to its own power. If you carry within you the number 33/6, many will feel the light you radiate and will gladly go with you: your faith and love will show them the way. You stand above current events for the good of all people, regardless of skin color, race, or nationality.
In fact, you are love personified. Clearly expressing your own needs and being willing to let others answer for themselves is part of what the 33/6 must learn in this life. Sacrifice is valuable only so long as the 'one who sacrifices' continues to exist. The number 33/6 can be a 'cosmic parent' and a master of healing energy, but, like all parents and healers, the 33/6 must leave something for itself.
4:
Organization and practicality define this life path. Such a person works persistently to build the foundation of their life. They love order, systematicity, and method. They use a rational and consistent approach to solving problems. They like to control situations, people, and things. They are not inclined to step aside when they encounter difficulties. They do not seek quick riches; they are inclined toward persistent and prolonged labor. They adhere firmly to their own ideals, are fair and honest. They may be too conservative where change is needed.
This leads to inevitable failures. They feel most comfortable when they have a long-term perspective. Step by step they move toward the set goal, for they are certain it is worth the sacrifices made and the efforts expended. They are ready to spend their whole life moving toward a single set goal. They are able to take in any idea and bring about its practical realization.

Establishing order and rules helps them feel confident, and they strive to maintain it at home, at work, and in their own life. They are able to manage money well. Purposefulness, practicality, and consistency foster the development of creative skills and ensure financial stability. The possession of material means holds an indisputable value for them. Workaholics and stubborn conservatives. THE MOST STUBBORN.
Stable and reliable, like the Great Wall of China; and just like it, they are devilishly hard to budge. They greatly love order, precision, and systematicity in everything, whether it concerns work or personal relationships. Cold and calculating, they need solid ground beneath their feet - a financial cushion or a stash in a sock (at the very least). Their greatest minus and plus is STUBBORNNESS. It is impossible to out-argue them; they have two opinions: theirs (divine rightness) and everyone else's. 
They are often slow-moving in life, arranging everything unhurriedly (studies, work, marriage). Sometimes very unhurriedly. Do not expect unpredictable, spontaneous actions from them, or you will go gray. But these are the most reliable of husbands, true family men (since they dislike changing anything), hardworking and responsible; with them you are as safe as behind a stone wall. 
In life it is foreordained for you to play the role of manager and ORGANIZER.
You are a builder, and your mission is to make things stable and lasting. You must lend practicality to dreams and bring all fantasies down to earth. Life will not allow you to view things simply, and a multitude of serious problems will trouble you until you learn to skillfully systematize and bring into order and proper form your business and personal affairs. 
This may not always align with your wishes, but if you want the best from life, then you must constantly strive for the unity of idea and result; for you were born to take on responsibility, and others will turn to you for help and protection. Your lasting success depends on advancing 'from scratch,' regardless of the nature of the work performed. At the very least, you must strive to achieve tangible results and to give concrete form to plans.
Excessive haste and carelessness in your affairs can ruin you. Any change or new plan must lead to an improvement of order, management, and reliability.

Because of a heightened sense of responsibility, when faced with difficulties they are prone to depression and a feeling of anxiety about the future. Life for them may become a daily struggle for survival. Weariness from routine leads to outbursts of emotion or to illness. At times they are lazy, hard to get moving. They fear any change, display stubbornness, jealousy, envy, causticity, and narrowness of thinking.

Intermediaries, traders, merchants, advertisers, journalists, critics. Economists, accountants (any work requiring attention to detail, record-keeping, calculation, system).
Registrars, estimators, administrators. Scholars: mathematicians, philologists, literary scholars. Writers. Linguists. Language specialists. Builders, businessmen (manufacturing), military service, accountant, civil service, logistics. The organization of any projects or events. Work with documents. When there are several 2s and the Life Path is 4 - cool bloggers.
THE TALISMAN OF THE EAGLE, OF WEALTH, OF THE DRAGON, THE STAR OF FORTUNE, THE TALISMAN OF DIVINE AID
5:
Energy, a clear mind, and magnanimity define this person. Communication helps them feel their own significance. Their thoughts and manners are filled with sensuality. From them emanates a natural magnetism; people fall under the sway of their charm. But they too depend on those around them, as well as on the surrounding world. They are interested in everything in the world; in life they try to experience all that is possible. Not a single detail escapes their attention. In everything that concerns concrete facts, they seek scientific confirmation. For them, life is a fascinating experiment that must be studied carefully. Curiosity sometimes prompts them to ill-considered acts. In life, changes constantly occur that require the ability to adapt and the manifestation of their numerous abilities.
Persistence, tenacity, and luck help them overcome all obstacles. They always clearly picture what they are striving for and, without hesitation, go straight toward the set goal. Through their enthusiasm they attract the right people and favorable circumstances. They believe in themselves and in their possibilities. Inspiration, aspiration, the help of friends, as well as discipline and concentration, give them success in life.

They are meant to bring innovations into the world, to move everything and everyone forward, to introduce new ideas and technologies. To bring freedom and progress to the world.
Eternal seekers and adventurers. They need adventure, risk, travel, adrenaline - and almost daily. Better yet, every day, more and longer. The most important thing for them is a change of scenery.
Places, people, things - it concerns everything. Otherwise they begin to mope and fade; the matter not rarely reaches depression. They cannot sit in one place for 30 years. 
They are always in search. They seek themselves, their ideal place in life, their profession. 
They adore being a thorn in your side, especially if they have been stuck in one place too long, and they do it thoroughly and diligently - not only to those around them but to their own dear selves. 
Fives are very risk-taking folk; the thirst for adventure drowns out the voice of reason and the instinct of self-preservation. So, dear fives, please, be more careful.
Dreamers, they have a nonstandard mode of thinking; their ideas are always unusual. Creative, sensitive natures. They are difficult, but interesting. They make good scholars and fantasists. They need to keep gaining knowledge constantly. 
Life is preparing for you a multitude of experiences and changes. Some of them will be imposed upon you, while the cause of others will turn out to be you yourself. Your mission in life is to further FREEDOM and PROGRESS. 
It may be difficult for you, even with all your desire, to be in contact for a long time with the same people or to engage in the same work. For at the basis of all progress lie new ideas and methods, change and renewal. Only by abandoning the old can one bring the new to life.
You must master this lesson, for you came into the world to become one of those who stand both for universal freedom and for the freedom of individuals. You need to help people live more freely and happily. If something in life confines you, develop your resourcefulness and versatility, use your mind to keep pace with the times and stay afloat in the turbulent current of world progress. When changes come unexpectedly, do not fear them and do not cling to the old. Accept the new and make it a step toward further development and the achievement of better results. But to be free does not mean deliberately breaking with traditions. 
Progress is not rebellion. It means enlightenment and the setting of great goals, the desire to labor and to learn. Orient yourself toward the light and the very best in life. Do not allow yourself to fall behind on life's path. Be a lawgiver!

The restlessness of their character leads to scatteredness: before finishing one matter, they rush off after new impressions. At times they evade responsibility and do not wish to grasp the essence of a matter. Sometimes they may plunge headlong into work, leaving neither strength nor time for anything else. Because of the breadth of their perception, they may change their views to diametrically opposite ones, which makes them an unreliable partner. They are often guided by impulsive promptings rather than by contractual obligations.

Lawyer, priest, publisher, judge. Public figure. Connection with abroad, travel, tour guide, guide. Higher education, teaching, upbringing. Scholar. Entrepreneur, financier. Published writer.
Guide, traveler, creative, pilot, firefighter, advertising, show business, all risk-taking professions. Scholars. Viners. The film industry (actors, producers). Bloggers.

6:
Responsibility and care for others are the chief qualities of such a person. They strive to help people and often support people in moments difficult for them. The inclination toward responsibility is laid into their very nature. They never shy away from sacrificing themselves. They strive to maintain harmony within the family and among colleagues at work, balancing and restraining the opposing sides. They live by the interests of the collective. They are gladdened not so much by their own achievements as by the successful results of collective efforts. Selflessness is one of their chief properties. They require beauty, peace, and harmony in their surroundings, especially in their home. They invariably reveal sympathy and understanding.
Love is the force that governs their life; they ascend to a higher understanding of love, Universal love. In life they are destined to take on many obligations, but, overcoming cares and difficulties, they know that this is a way to better make sense of and understand life, to become stronger in spirit. A person is never given trials beyond their possibilities. They value the support and help of others. They have a heightened sense of responsibility for their actions and toward the obligations they have taken on. They always bring a matter to completion. For them, logic stands above feelings.

To help people through beauty and care. These people came into our world to bring beauty and grace, to bestow love and care. Aesthetes and great humanists. To help people, to engage in charity.
With their touch, everything should become more beautiful - flowers, things, homes, nature, and humankind. Negative sixes idealize love too much; they seek this feeling everywhere, seek the ideal partner, and their excessive, inflated expectations do not always allow them to build good relationships, or at least lasting ones. They masterfully 'love' to nag, beautifully and gracefully. 
The most caring of people, they always think of their loved ones, very attentive. Excellent partners for marriage; family values are the most important to them. But! Sometimes they slip into overprotection and can smother with this care. 
Nearly all sixes have a talent connected with the hands (photography, drawing, cooking, literature). Sixes also have a pull toward knowledge; they very much love to learn.
Among them are quite a few scholars; they can delve deeply into the material, bringing something new to science. They are excellent teachers. You possess a good ability to earn money; if you find yourself broke or are forced to 'slave away' for others, it means that there is insufficient generosity in your desire for the well-being of those around you, or else you ignored your service at the hour when it was required.

There may be an inclination to interfere in others' affairs, intrusive patronage, suspiciousness, extravagance; sometimes they do not wish to forgive people their weaknesses if those differ from the ones characteristic of themselves. They may forget their own interests, carried away by public ones, or, conversely, forget the interests of others for the sake of their own.
They often take on others' obligations, but giving oneself entirely to caring for others is not worthwhile; one must live one's own life. One should learn to say 'no' to people at times and not feel pangs of conscience in doing so. They can be sensitive beyond measure and touchy.

Connection with art (according to the prevailing elements). Music, literature (Water). Dance (Fire, Earth). Design, architecture, fashion, golden hands, a talent for creativity. Adornments (Earth). The sphere of entertainment and pleasures (Air, Earth). Lawyers, diplomats, peacemakers, mediators (Air). Agriculture, gardening, naturalist, teacher, painter, musician, writer, journalist, peacemaker, volunteer, scholar. Medicine. The entire beauty industry (makeup artist, nail technician), massage.
Designer, stylist, fashion. There are a multitude of directions in which people with Life Path Number 6 can realize themselves; these are very many-sided people.

7:
The attainment of knowledge and wisdom defines this person's path. They possess a fine mind, are inclined to think analytically, and are capable of deep concentration of thought and theoretical generalization. They have an inclination toward self-analysis. They take stock of what is happening and know how to draw the appropriate conclusions. They understand that life's difficulties are a necessary condition for the growth and development of the personality, and that everything that happens is filled with hidden meaning. Analysis of the situation that has arisen helps them find optimal solutions. At times they withdraw into themselves and, drawing on their rich imagination, give themselves over to dreams. They love solitude and strive to work independently. They need time to nurture their own ideas, away from outside influence. This is a personality living exclusively by their own ideas and methods.
They need their own space, the possibility of solitude. They strongly guard their inner sovereignty. Therefore it is difficult for them to form and maintain close relationships with people, and this concerns marriage especially. With a well-arranged life they are courteous and attractive, displaying breadth and magnanimity of soul, generously sharing their energy and attention with people. But when their rights are ignored, they become irritable and harsh. They have a developed sense of responsibility. They possess strict inner discipline, punctuality, and a sense of self-worth. They are self-reliant and independent. They go their own way, knowing firmly what they want and how to achieve it. They rely only on themselves. Thanks to self-possession and steadfastness, they overcome any critical situations. They possess the potential for unlimited growth and success in life.
So, you sevens, do not lock yourselves in your shell, do not wall yourselves off from people; share your observations and experiences. 
Sevens love to unravel riddles, to dig down to the essence; they are very fastidious; if they are in the negative, they look for a catch in everything, suspicious. Often they feel lonely and misunderstood, even when surrounded by a multitude of people. They must not pity themselves, though they very much love to play the victim. And they also have a talent for inflating any problem into a tragedy of cosmic scale.

Your mission is to bring enlightenment to the world, to unravel the mysteries of the universe or of human nature. It is foreordained for you to be one of the world's ENLIGHTENERS. Before you set down on paper or preach your knowledge to your fellows, you must study, verify, and prove the facts and be convinced of their authenticity.
Your life should be interesting, for in the search for knowledge you will encounter a multitude of events and unusual acquaintances that will help you learn to distinguish the true from the false. It is foreordained for you to discover, reveal, and understand the mysteries of life, to delve into the hidden, the scientific, and the occult. You may even be called strange, unlike others, or incomprehensible.

An inclination toward gloominess, aloofness, secretiveness. They are subject to a feeling of preoccupation, discomfort, and anxiety about themselves and the future. It is possible they will hunt for problems where there are none, suspiciousness, withdrawal from reality into their own imaginary world.

Government official, executive. Banks, real estate, insurance, taxes. Work with durable materials, metallurgy. Architecture, sculpture. Professions requiring sound judgment, composure, and patience. Realtor, trader, builder, timekeeper, entrepreneur. Scholar, psychologist, coach, esoterics, astrologer, numerologist, scientist. Investigator. President. Politician.
8:
Will, creative realization, and independence define such a person's path. Activity and an understanding of the material world help to secure a firm position in life. Their abilities are especially manifested in the realization of large projects, the accomplishment of great tasks, and the pursuit of distant goals. They possess the ability to inspire people and to unite them for the fulfillment of their projects. 
They intuitively divine advantageous opportunities, see the paths to achieving a goal, and have the strength and abilities to realize them, and therefore they attain great success in life. They know how to handle money, power, and force well. They are able to labor persistently themselves and are demanding of others. But to achieve the desired success, one must apply great efforts, live through ups and downs, and cultivate will and responsibility.
Life tests them repeatedly; at times they find themselves in seemingly hopeless situations. By overcoming difficulties, they will be able to learn to manifest the talents laid within them - firmness, decisiveness, and strength. It is necessary to constantly maintain a balance between spiritual and material interests. This is a path requiring correspondence between what a person takes and what they give. One must learn to assess oneself and other people correctly, to care for the people and matters dependent on them. One must use one's creative force for the good of society and accept fate with gratitude, as a definite stage of development. This is the number of swift karmic recompense.

To be on a grand scale, to open one's own enterprise. To earn money. Businessmen, merchants, traders.
The most money-oriented Life Path Number. They love money, and it returns their affection. They scent profit from a mile away. Excellent managers, not afraid of responsibility, with an entrepreneurial cast of mind; they can reach the international level of trade and business, can make any process profitable. But for success to come to them, they must work out of love, engage in a matter they are passionate about, and not only for the sake of wealth. 
Cruel, commanding, and strong people. If an eight is in the negative, then this is a very avaricious and greedy person who will not lift their backside unless they are paid for it. They crush those around them, dictators and aggressors. It is important for them, in the pursuit of big money, to remain simply human, not to forget their loved ones, to be softer and kinder. For women this is a very treacherous number, since they not rarely become wealthy and successful and attract weak men; it is difficult for them to meet a person who is 'a match.'
Also, under no circumstances should women eights play at being desperate housewives; realize yourselves in business, manage affairs and companies; domestic life is not for you. It will devour you, and you will gnaw at those around you. 
They have a very powerful force of thought, so be more careful: do not invent a bad life for yourself, for it will come to pass. If a dentist, they can open their own medical center; a hairdresser, their own salon.
It is important to open your own BUSINESS!

An inclination toward egocentrism, rudeness, extravagance. They love to argue and not rarely dramatize situations. There may be boastfulness, the manipulation of other people, control over them, manifestations of stubbornness, intolerance, and a commanding nature.

Scientist, inventor, engineer, modern technologies, innovations, computers. Pilots, test pilots, revolutionaries. Astrologers. The nuclear industry. Radio engineering. Electronics. Lighting equipment. Automobiles. Film director, producer, actor. Professions requiring keenness of mind, analytical abilities, independent thinking, inventiveness, flight. Any money-oriented profession, managers, businessmen, the spheres of real estate and construction, realtor, investor. Business owners or major leadership posts. Lawyers. Women should not sit at home for long, on maternity leave! They need to realize themselves.

9:
Humanism, idealism, and concern for the fate of humanity define such a person's path. They have a broad philosophical view of life. They are inclined to survey broad perspectives rather than to examine small details in depth. They possess a developed creative imagination, a sense of beauty and harmony. Perceptive, they respond sensitively to all life's events, from which they draw the appropriate conclusions. It is good if this is a highly spiritual or religious person; these qualities can play a defining, positive role in their life. They strive for knowledge, for intellectual communication. They have a notion of a little of everything, are interested in all that happens in the world. They possess artistic taste and musical abilities; perhaps they play some musical instrument or sing.
The foundation of their individuality is the need to sacrifice, concern for those around them and for the needs of the whole world. Idealism at times hinders a realistic perception of life. They hold to their own views and are ready to defend them before everyone. But another point of view is also of interest to them; they love discussions and the exchange of opinions. They have a wide circle of acquaintances, are magnanimous and generous. Patient toward the shortcomings of others. Democratic in their views. More a theorist than a practitioner. The striving to know the world in all its manifestations fills their life with events. This is always an extraordinary, often contradictory, passionate, life-loving, very attractive personality.

To help people through wisdom and understanding (a rare, costly, unusual direction). 
People with Life Path Number 9 are rare precious stones. Many-faceted, vivid, refined.
The number 9 includes within itself all the digits, so nines may possess any talent, ability, and quality. They are very wise. Good psychologists, they sense people on an intuitive level. People of enormous inner strength; they have a reinforced-concrete core within, so do not try to break them. 
It is important for them to be prestigious; they surround themselves with beautiful things. They love everything rare, unusual, costly. And their professions must be connected with the rare, costly, and unusual, or else provide some kind of exclusive services (oil, gold, precious stones, the arts, fashion, metals). They are aesthetes; the sense of the beautiful is built into their DNA, so they are also excellent designers. 
Their mission is to make the ordinary, gray, and dull into the extravagant, graceful, aesthetic. This concerns things, services, people, and even life itself.
And their life, by the way, truly is always unusual, with a dashing twist of plot and the appearance of extraordinary characters. Nines are touchy; what is more, they can take offense even over a trifle. But the more they take offense, the more life will toss them troubles, until they learn to relate to everything differently and to forgive. They must remember: the more they give, the more they receive. Therefore it is good for them to engage in charity. FROM THE HEART. And they also love to make a scene, the QUEEN OF DRAMA, very emotional, in places depressive.
They may perceive life illusorily, dissolve into the world, and often lack a definite goal.

Psychologists, mystics, cultural scholars. Occult matters. Music, poetry, artistic activity. Helping people, alternative medicine, pharmacology, the chemical industry. Prevention of addictions. Secrets, riddles, the hidden, work in solitude. Oceanographers, fishermen. All unusual professions, psychologists, designers, sexologists. The sale of rare, costly, unusual, exclusive accessories and services. Philosophers.
